description: Mission-critical high-voltage infrastructure inspection using BVLOS (Beyond Visual Line of Sight) drones equipped with Corona/UV cameras, LiDAR, and real-time deep learning anomaly classification.
learning_objectives: Understand the anatomy of electrical power infrastructure: transmission towers, conductors, insulators, substations, and right‑of‑way corridors
Build and train AI models for detecting common defects: broken conductors, damaged insulators, corrosion, vegetation encroachment, and thermal hotspots
Create geospatial data pipelines for managing utility assets and inspection history over thousands of kilometers of lines
Deploy optimized models on edge hardware for real‑time defect detection during flight, enabling immediate alerts
Implement autonomous flight patterns along power lines, including tower‑to‑tower navigation and precise positioning near energized equipment
Design safe operational procedures to maintain distance from live wires and comply with utility safety regulations
Integrate with utility GIS (Geographic Information Systems) and asset management platforms

modules.title: BVLOS Transmission Line Tracking
modules.description: Develop closed-loop vision control systems for autonomous tracking of high-voltage transmission lines over hundreds of kilometers.
topics: Catenary curve fitting & wire tracking algorithms
Magnetic interference mitigation & sensor voting
BVLOS communication links (LTE/5G bonding, SATCOM backup)
Dynamic path planning around transmission towers
Failsafe Return-to-Home architectures in GNSS-denied areas

modules.title: Multi-Spectral Corona & Thermal Analysis
modules.description: Detect subtle corona discharges and thermal hotspots indicating imminent insulator failure.
topics: UV/Corona Discharge quantification
Radiometric thermal profiling of transformers
Spatio-temporal alignment of UV, IR, and RGB streams
Edge-based anomaly triggering & thresholding
Predictive maintenance modeling using time-series AI

modules.title: Automated Wind Turbine Blade Scanning
modules.description: Execute precision spiral trajectories around operating or parked wind turbines to capture millimeter-accurate blade surface models.
topics: Relative 3D positioning using RTK & Onboard LiDAR
Automated flight path generation for complex aerodynamic surfaces
Defect segmentation (Lightning strikes, Delamination, Leading edge erosion)
Instance Segmentation (Mask R-CNN) for crack sizing
Digital Twin integration of blade health

modules.title: LiDAR Vegetation Encroachment Monitoring
modules.description: Leverage massive aerial LiDAR point clouds to measure exact distances between power lines and surrounding vegetation.
topics: Point cloud classification (Ground, Wire, Vegetation)
Clearance distance calculation & risk categorization
Automated vegetation management scheduling (Optimization algorithms)
Processing billion-point datasets with PDAL/LAStools
Batch job orchestration via Kubernetes

capstone_project.name: Autonomous Power Line and Substation Inspection Drone
capstone_project.description: Build and test a drone system that autonomously inspects a 1‑2 km segment of transmission line (simulated in HIL or a controlled outdoor area) and a small substation. The system must follow the line from tower to tower, detect at least three types of defects (e.g., broken insulator, corroded hardware, vegetation encroachment), and capture thermal images to identify a simulated hot spot. Generate a report with geotagged defects and recommend actions. Achieve >85% recall for defects and <10% false positives.
deliverables: Trained defect detection models (insulator, conductor, vegetation, thermal) quantized (<150 MB total)
ROS 2 nodes for line following, inspection planning, and defect logging
PostGIS database for tower inventory and inspection results
HIL simulation report with detection rates and mission completion time
Safety plan including minimum approach distances and emergency procedures

resources.name: IEEE 1788 – Guide for Drone Inspection of Power Lines
EPRI Drone Inspection Guidelines
resources.description: Electric Power Research Institute best practices

glossary.definition: Beyond Visual Line Of Sight. Drone operations where the pilot cannot physically see the aircraft.
An electrical discharge brought on by the ionization of a fluid such as air surrounding a conductor that is electrically charged.
The curve that an idealized hanging chain or cable assumes under its own weight when supported only at its ends.
Point Data Abstraction Library. A C++/Python open source library and applications for translating and processing point cloud data.
A deep neural network aimed at solving instance segmentation problems in machine learning or computer vision.
